---
title: "sconjoint"
---

# Coming soon

This Quarto book will be the primary documentation for the `sconjoint`
R package. The package is currently at milestone M1 (skeleton only);
the book will be populated as the estimator, inference, and structural
quantity functions land in later milestones.

See the project [README](https://github.com/xuyiqing/structural-conjoint)
for the development roadmap.
